goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should 'arrive by 12:15' and should depart from 'cambridge'.
The train should leave on 'monday' and should go to 'broxbourne'.
Make sure you get 'travel time' and 'train ID'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of 'cinema' and should be in the 'centre'.
Make sure you get 'entrance fee'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should arrive by 12:15 and should depart from cambridge
The train should leave on monday and should go to broxbourne
Make sure you get travel time and train ID
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of cinema and should be in the centre
Make sure you get entrance fee
